content:
Your resume is clear and well-organized. Your objective statement is present, but it could be more tailored to the specific job you’re applying for. Your work experience section is well-detailed, but adding quantifiable achievements (e.g., percentages, specific outcomes) would help showcase your impact. Also, double-check formatting consistency, especially with spacing and punctuation in your bullet points.

Overall, you have a strong foundation, and with a few refinements, your materials will be even more polished. Keep up the great work!

Best,
Professor Padavano

Grades:
• Cover Letter: 85/100
• Resume: 88/100

⸻

Letter for Juana Casallas Diaz

Dear Juana,

Thank you for submitting your resume and cover letter. I appreciate the effort you put into crafting your materials. Below is my feedback.

Your cover letter is well-structured and clearly presents your background and enthusiasm for the role. One area for improvement is customization—while you highlight your qualifications well, adding more details about why you’re drawn to this specific company would make your letter even stronger. Your closing paragraph could also be refined to include a more direct call to action, such as requesting an interview or expressing enthusiasm for further discussion.
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 19 (chunk 19/22)
